channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: More and more earbuds come with touchscreen cases, but after testing a bunch of them, I'm still not convinced it's the future — do you really get the best value this way?
item.description: With more and more earbuds coming with touchscreen cases, I've got to ask: "why?".

item.title: The phenomenal Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphones are down to a record-low price right now at Amazon
item.description: The Sony WH-1000XM6 Headphones are some of the best headphones around, and right now, you can buy them for a record-low price at Amazon.

item.title: Halide Mark III adds a built-in editor to the popular camera app
item.description: The update also introduces the app's take on film stock simulation.

item.title: Steam Deck de retour en stock, mais Valve a salé l’addition
item.description: Le Steam Deck est revenu en stock en France, mais Valve en a profité pour faire passer le modèle OLED 1 To de 679 € à 919 €. Bonne nouvelle, donc, sauf pour le portefeuille.

item.title: All the news about Ferrari’s polarizing Luce EV
item.description: Ferrari fans don’t like the design of the new Luce EV, an electric four-door sedan that just doesn’t look like the Ferraris of old. It was designed with help from Jony Ive’s LoveFrom, but what worked for Ive at Apple isn’t working for Ferrari. The Luce’s launch immediately preceded a stock drop that even an […]

item.title: Marathon's first open play week starts on June 2
item.description: Bungie also shared more information about what players can expect from the game's new season.

item.title: In more good news for Amazon, Snowflake signs $6B deal with AWS for AI CPU chips
item.description: Snowflake has signed a new, enormous five-year deal with Amazon to secure chips for AI usage. Nvidia is once again being put on notice.

item.title: The new Halide camera app launches with film looks and an upgraded photo editor
item.description: After first being announced in December 2024, Lux Optics has finally released the latest version of its Halide camera app for the iPhone and iPad. The Halide Mark III app's most compelling feature is a new film simulation engine and a collection of five new Looks that can be applied to photos as they're taken. […]

item.title: Los Angeles transit system hack blamed on Iranian attackers - but they might not have worked alone
item.description: Some researchers believe the attack was the work of the Iranian government, not hacktivists.

item.title: Facebook launches a ‘Plus’ subscription that gives you extra features
item.description: After announcing tests of premium subscriptions for Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp earlier this year, TechCrunch and Bloomberg report that Meta is launching a global rollout over the next few weeks and is also starting to test subscriptions for Meta AI. With the new offerings, Meta joins many other tech companies in changing up its subscription plans […]...

item.title: Meta rolls out subscription tiers for Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp
item.description: The class disparity is only growing on Instagram, Facebook and WhatsApp.

item.title: MiniMax teases upcoming M3 model with new sparse attention mechanism and 15.6X long-context response speed boost
item.description: Among the many Chinese AI companies and laboratories vying for market share and attention (no pun intended) on the global marketplace, MiniMax stands out for its commitment to providing frontier-level intelligence across a range of modalities, including text, coding, and video (through its Hailuo model series) — often under permissive, enterprise-friendly, standard open source licenses. Now, MiniMax is again raising the eyebrows of AI power users and developers around the world by releasing a new, in-depth technical report on the making of its popular M2 series of language models (M2, M2.5, an...

item.title: Read the fine print before you let an AI agent do your stock trading for you on Robinhood
item.description: The investing platform says artificial intelligence can now execute trades without direct user input, but the feature carries ‘significant risk.’ Would you let AI take the reins of your stock trading account? Robinhood is giving users the option.

item.title: Payroll startup Remote says it grew revenue 50% per employee without adding headcount
item.description: Payroll service provider Remote recently surpassed $300 million in annual recurring revenue (ARR) and became cash-flow positive, thanks to a 50% increase in revenue per employee resulting from AI adoption.

item.title: Google’s search overhaul has social media users baiting the ‘AI Overview’ to prove a point
item.description: How many letter Ls are in the word “Google”? That’s still a tough question for the platform’s newly expanded AI Mode. It’s been just over a week since Google announced a controversial overhaul of its search engine.

item.title: Meilleur robot aspirateur laveur 2026 : notre top 3 testés et recommandés
item.description: Les différentes marques d'aspirateurs robots rivalisent d'ingéniosité pour développer des innovations. Voici trois modèles que nous recommandons si vous cherchez le meilleur aspirateur robot laveur de 2026 : des machines qui aspirent et nettoient les sols en un seul passage.

item.title: AI content to be automatically labeled on YouTube — but not on YouTube Kids
item.description: YouTube is making its AI labels more prominent on videos, and adding automatic labeling to fill the gaps.

item.title: Roids were all the rage at the Enhanced Games
item.description: In Las Vegas, the blazing sun beats down on a makeshift Olympic-length pool. Cody Miller stands on the starting block of lane one. His arms are raised in victory. MC Hammer's "U Can't Touch This" thumps over the loudspeakers as he rips off his swimming cap, throwing it to the ground. Miller lets out a […]
